meta.notes: Fresh rerun of the Codex benchmark prompt with each timed step executed separately. No install step and no upload step. The faster-whisper small model cache already existed at ~/.cache/faster-whisper/models--Systran--faster-whisper-small, so no first-run model download was included. Token totals came from tools/extract-codex-tokens.py --latest --json after the benchmark run.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: Portrait vlog benchmark asset with spoken English audio for end-to-end TikTok-style caption burn-in.

task.name: video-captions
task.purpose: Benchmark the local video-captions skill against the standard 67.8s daily vlog asset using TikTok-style burned-in captions.
task.expected_output: A captioned mp4 with TikTok-style word-highlight subtitles burned into the video.

install.notes: Not applicable. The skill was already present locally at ~/code/nova3-agent-skills/video-captions/.

steps.name: transcribe_faster_whisper
steps.notes: Standalone faster-whisper small CPU int8 transcription with word timestamps and VAD. Output: language=en words=138.

steps.name: caption_script_full
steps.notes: Full caption_video.py run with --style tiktok. Generated /tmp/bench_vc_captioned.ass and /tmp/bench_vc_captioned.mp4. Script reported detected language en.

execution.notes: Execution total is the sum of the individually timed execution commands: probe + standalone audio extraction + standalone transcription + full caption script.

delivery.notes: Local delivery only; output remained on disk at /tmp/bench_vc_captioned.mp4.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-codex-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. All 8 skills ran in a single Codex session with monotonically increasing token counts.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
